properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v2 v4 v7 v4 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once I was lost, wandering in darkness, No life in sight, no hope in sight, He called my name and healed my blindness, Set me ablaze, now I'm alive with.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: His love breaking through my heart of stone, Love breathing to awake my bones, Love reaching out to save my soul, Love never gonna let me go.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And now my heart so full of worship, I can't hold back, I can't contain it, For all He's done, Jesus my savior, I am ablaze and full of thanks for.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Love calling me as I am, Love making me new again, Love lifting me when I can't, Love never gonna let me go.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Wherever you've been (wherever you've been), Whatever you've done (whatever you've done), Come as you are, Come into His open arms.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Wherever you've been (wherever you've been) Whatever you've done (whatever you've done) Come as you are, Come find.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Love breaking through my heart of stone, Love breathing to awake my bones, Love reaching out to save my soul, Love never gonna let me go.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Love never gonna let me go, Love never gonna let me go.
